description: CEO made anti-gay comments on radio. Global boycott, then complete corporate reversal to LGBTQ+ champion (perfect HRC score by 2015). Gold standard of crisis recovery through authentic transformation.

key_events.description: Guido Barilla makes anti-gay family comments on La Zanzara radio. #BoycottBarilla trends globally.
Guido Barilla issues video apology and meets Italian LGBTQ+ groups. Skepticism remains high.
Barilla creates external Diversity & Inclusion Board. Hires David Mixner (prominent LGBTQ+ activist) as advisor.
Barilla sponsors Pride events, extends same-sex partner benefits. Former critics acknowledge genuine change.
Barilla achieves perfect 100% score on HRC Corporate Equality Index. Complete transformation validated.

calibration_notes: Longest timeline (2+ years in 9 rounds). Recovery required sustained authentic action over months/years, not just weathering a news cycle. The company went far beyond damage control — became a genuine LGBTQ+ leader. 'Pro' in early rounds includes some conservative supporters who agreed with original comments. HRC score is objective, auditable metric. Harvard Business School case study. Tests: crisis-to-rehabilitation arc, position reversal dynamics, authentic vs performative response, and how sustained action outweighs apologies.
